"[80] 805 ADVD IF WE CAN GET A TOW TO RESP NOW THAT IS FINE // VEH IS APPX 30 FT OFF THE RDWY AND APPX 8 FT DOWN [Shared]"

"[54] 1039 TEH SO TO ADV ON UPDATED INFORMATION : WHILE ON CALL THEY ADV HE IS ON MANDITORY SUPERVISION FOR 69 PC [Shared]"

"[44] [Appended, 05:21:47] [7] THEN CAME BACK AND CONFESSED THAT HE ROLLED HIS VEH "

"[26] [Rotation Request Comment] 1021 Premier Tow / PASSED"
"[25] TEH SO IS NOT RESPONDING TO THE DISTURBANCE AT R WILD HORSE RANCH AND IT WAS VERBAL ONLY THEY GAVE A DL OF D3043619 IN CASE THE VEHS 28 IS A MATCH "
"[24] LL W/CAL FIRE FOR UPDATED 1020"

"[21] [Notification] [CHP]-1039 CF : 2 ENGS THERE // THEY HAVE NOT SPECIFIED ANYTHING ABOUT A TOW // 1 VEH ON ITS SIDE OUT CHECKING ON INJS // NEG FURTHER UPDATES BUT WILL CB IF THEY GET ANY BEFORE WE GO 97"
"[20] C36-805 ANY UPDATES FROM CAL FIRE // IF THEY ARE 97 IF THEY CAN GIVE ANY INFO ON 1185"
"[13] AND THEN SHOWED BACK UP TO THE RANCH IN A DIFFERENT VEH "
"[2] ABOUT 10 MILES JWO BOWMAN RD "
